practical_description: Baseline padding found behind most soft armor. Reduces bruising and helps with fit. Useless alone. Compresses under load and slowly rebounds.
visual_description: Dull grey sheet with spongey feel. Texture like athletic mat. Compresses with a dry creak.

practical_description: Conformal trauma dampener. Absorbs backface deformation well. Sticky, heat-stable, and often paired with ceramic armor. Heavy but reliable.
visual_description: Clear-blue slab with slow-flowing consistency. Cold and pliable. Smears slightly when rubbed.

practical_description: Modular padding used in high-tech kits. Customizable airflow and damping patterns. Fails by cracking at hinges.
visual_description: Transparent plastic web, hexagonal pattern. Compresses like a spring. Snaps back sharply when released.

practical_description: Reactive under force. Absorbs slow or fast hits differently. Slowly conforms to shape, often used in fitted vests.
visual_description: Light beige slab, warm and dense. Dentable by finger. Returns shape in slow motion.

practical_description: Cutting-edge pad with antimicrobial and thermal regulation traits. Great in extreme climates or long-wear deployments.
visual_description: Black matte with slight shimmer. Cool to the touch. Flexible like heavy leather but rebounds sharper.

practical_description: Used for thermal and blast insulation. Not good for direct kinetic hits but adds comfort and temperature control. Brittle under compression.
visual_description: Frosted translucent blue, rigid and dry. Breaks like foam glass. Dusts lightly when scraped.

practical_description: Industrial padding for heavy armor suits. Great at soaking slow force. Cumbersome. Retains heat and moisture.
visual_description: Dark green or charcoal block. Feels like kneepad core. Slight rubber reverb when tapped.

practical_description: Worn under armor for sweat and airflow control. Adds negligible protection but boosts wear time comfort.
visual_description: Silver-grey mesh with a loose weave. Compresses like loosely stuffed pillow. Breathes easily when pressed.
